title: Gantt group names get cut off when exporting to PDF
excerpt: Desperately need Monday’s gantt features to be more presentable. Currently, when I export to PDF the group titles of each of my timeline groups include the name of the group, start & end date and, duration of days. A lot…

posts.author: manda12987 (Amanda Feh)
posts.cookedHtml: Desperately need Monday’s gantt features to be more presentable. Currently, when I export to PDF the group titles of each of my timeline groups include the name of the group, start & end date and, duration of days. A lot of this gets cut off when exporting to PDF even though it is shorter than other lines on the gantt. I don’t understand why. To be clear this isn’t on the left side, it’s in the actual gantt where this gets cut off. Previously this got cut off in the left side view.

posts.author: BriKHami (Brik )
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. My team presents these to our board of directors and that is their chief complaint.

posts.author: TFaust (Timo Faust)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here, I wonder why this was not tackled. I mean, we got AI features for all things unnecessary, but basic features still missing.

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml: In reddit someone was building an app to fix this but not sure if they are still building it or not

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @amanda18 ,

If you use PDFs for collaboration on timelines with clients, contractors, or other third parties outside of monday.com, I want to mention a more efficient way to do this on monday.

We’ve noticed the following pattern: Export Gantt → attach PDF → send email → wait for feedback → update timeline → export again → resend.

Repeat. And repeat. And repeat.

Somewhere along the way:

• no one remembers which version is the latest
• timeline changes get buried in long emails
• approvals take days
• testing gets delayed
• last-minute pressure before launch becomes inevitable

We developed the Interactive Gantt Timeline app, that allows to share Gantt with clients and collaborate directly on it:

  • Clients can leave comments and suggest timeline changes right on Gantt

    leave suggestions2045×1045 312 KB

  • PMs get notification about comments and suggestions, and can test different scenarios, and then approve the appropriate timeline.

    test versions gantt1581×993 212 KB

After approving, new timeline automatically updates the board.

Interactive Gantt Timeline doesn’t replace monday.com’s native Gantt — it enhances it.
Keep using monday.com’s Gantt view internally, and share Interactive Gantt Timeline with clients outside your workspace.

No version chaos.
No endless PDF exports.
Just one live Gantt for monday.com.

You can install and test the app on your account.
